title: plugins+ mod
description: this mod is a minecraft neoforge mod that adds multiple vanilla+ plugins that allow you to play Minecraft easily and not have to struggle with too many modloaders
body:
This mod is a Minecraft Neoforge mod that impoves the minecraft experience by including multiple vanilla+ plugins. the official mod itself only adds the veininer enchantement, the gamerule that allows you to turn hardcore even tho it doesn't look like it, and the "/fakemessage" command that allows you to send a message as a different user.
newer versions add new features, those features are shown in the changelog
